text.font-family: Apple SD Gothic Neo, SF Pro Text, Arial, sans-serif
Apple SD Gothic Neo, SF Pro Text, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: After first launch, follow these steps.

text.font-family: Apple SD Gothic Neo, SF Pro Text, Arial, sans-serif
Apple SD Gothic Neo, SF Pro Text, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: In this DMG, drag SyncWatcher.app to Applications.

text.font-family: Apple SD Gothic Neo, SF Pro Text, Arial, sans-serif
Apple SD Gothic Neo, SF Pro Text, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: If a security warning appears, right-click (or Ctrl-click) the app and choose "Open".

text.font-family: Apple SD Gothic Neo, SF Pro Text, Arial, sans-serif
Apple SD Gothic Neo, SF Pro Text, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: If it is still blocked, open System Settings → Privacy & Security and allow SyncWatcher.

text.font-family: Apple SD Gothic Neo, SF Pro Text, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: Depending on macOS policy, a first-launch security warning may appear.

text.font-family: Apple SD Gothic Neo, SF Pro Text, Arial, sans-serif
